title: `dag-transition` op — materialization and thin CLI command
definition_of_done: dag-transition op walks subtree and promotes all draft nodes to verified; trls dag-transition CLI command emits the op; tests pass; make check green
outcome: dag-transition op reuses OpDAGTransition with IssueID payload field to distinguish subtree-promotion from per-issue DAG-confirmation; promoteSubtreeConfidence walks children recursively; trls dag-transition --issue CLI command; backward-compatible with existing confirmed behavior; 6 new tests; make check green

notes.msg: Implemented dag-transition op: added IssueID to Payload, updated applyDAGTransition to walk subtree via promoteSubtreeConfidence, added newDAGTransitionCmd CLI command, all tests green, make check green at 80.6% coverage

decisions.choice: reuse existing OpDAGTransition op type with IssueID payload field to distinguish subtree-promotion from per-issue DAG-confirmation
decisions.rationale: Adding IssueID to Payload is backward-compatible: existing ops with Confirmed=true and no IssueID keep working unchanged; new ops with IssueID trigger subtree confidence promotion
